from datetime import datetime


def sort_events_by_priority(events: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    scored = [(compute_priority(e["type"], e["severity"], e["timestamp"]), e) for e in events]
    scored.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
    return [e for _, e in scored]


def sort_users_by_score(users: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    scored = [(calculate_reputation(u["posts"], u["karma"], u["age_days"]), u) for u in users]
    scored.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
    return [u for _, u in scored]


def sort_products_by_relevance(products: list[dict], query: str) -> list[dict]:
    scored = [(compute_relevance_score(p["title"], p["description"], query), p) for p in products]
    scored.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return [p for _, p in scored]


def sort_tasks_by_urgency(tasks: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    def urgency_key(t):
        due = datetime.strptime(t["due_date"], "%Y-%m-%d").timestamp()
        return due * urgency_weight(t["priority"])
    
    scored = [(urgency_key(t), t) for t in tasks]
    scored.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
    return [t for _, t in scored]


def sort_entries(entries: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    scored = [(expensive_hash(e["key"]) + expensive_normalize(e["value"]), e) for e in entries]
    scored.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
    return [e for _, e in scored]
